TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Bunun, story: bnNr-frog_Laniahu

S.FORM: laupaka dau hai na sadu mas.
S.TRANSL: 現在看得到
Now we can see

S.FORM: av andii tu ai.
S.TRANSL: 那個，嗯
that uhm

S.FORM: andii tu patasan tan.
S.TRANSL: 那本書
that book

S.FORM: sadu tu tasa uvaaz at aiza maz a asu.
S.TRANSL: 看得見一個孩子，就有那隻狗。
We can see one child, then there is that dog.

S.FORM: at aupa aiza maz a ai maz a sisiuh ingadah sia pan.
S.TRANSL: 就因為有那個青蛙在瓶子裡面。
Then because there is that frog in the bottle.

S.FORM: isian mas labian tu cikan.
S.TRANSL: 所以，我們可以知道他們在晚上。
So, we can know they are at night.

S.FORM: mmm at aupa ai ai labian aupa hai.
S.TRANSL: 嗯，嗯，因為深夜。
Uhm, uhm because it’s night.

S.FORM: at aupa maz a asu mas uvaaz cia asabah in naia sia sapalan.
S.TRANSL: 就，因為那隻狗和孩子在床睡著了。
Then, because that dog and child went to sleep in the bed.

S.FORM: ungat aupa nii tu haiapun tu masikua.
S.TRANSL: 就因為他不知道往哪裡。
Then because he doesn’t know where to.

S.FORM: at aupa ai at cinmakav in uvaaz a mas asu hai.
S.TRANSL: 孩子跟狗突然醒來。
The child and the dog suddenly wake up.

S.FORM: naia hai masivit mas pan tu at.
S.TRANSL: 他們覺察瓶子
They inspect the bottle

S.FORM: via tu ka uk in adii sisiuh a.
S.TRANSL: 為什麼青蛙不在那裡了？
Why is the frog no longer there?

S.FORM: ai hai nii kata haiap tu maz adii sisiuh a hai masikua.
S.TRANSL: 我們沒辦法知道那個青蛙往哪走了。
We can’t know where that frog went to.

S.FORM: pahasia na kilimun ta.
S.TRANSL: 所以，我們會找牠。
So we will look for him.

S.FORM: ai at kuisadii sisiuh a ungat.
S.TRANSL: 就，青蛙就去哪裡？
Then, were did that frog go to?

S.FORM: maz a adii.
S.TRANSL: 那個那邊。
That one over there.

S.FORM: uvaaz mas asu hai maupa cia amin naia tu kaivakaiva naia tu at.
S.TRANSL: 小朋與與狗，他們都緊張。
The child and the dog,all of them were nervous.

S.FORM: usabi(n ma)s sisiuh ai.
S.TRANSL: usa ‘where’ usually is ‘isa’
Where did the frog go

S.FORM: maz a sisiuh a ingadah sia pan hai ka uka at.
S.TRANSL: 那個在瓶子裡面的青蛙，但牠不在。
That frog inside the bottle, but it’s not there.

S.FORM: amin a kucu ka tunbakun amin sadu tu ka kungadah sia kucu tan at.
S.TRANSL: 所有的鞋子被打開，被檢查，看見他們是否進去鞋子裡面。
All of the shoes were opened and inspected to see if he went into the shoes.

S.FORM: maz adii a asu hai.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗，
That dog over there,

S.FORM: saia ai kungadah bungu sia.
S.TRANSL: 牠把頭進去。
He puts in its head.

S.FORM: ava dii tu ai dangia(n ma)s sisiuh tu pan cia s adu adu.
S.TRANSL: 在那裡，以看見他們放青蛙的瓶子是否。
In there, to see if the bottle where they put the frog.

S.FORM: at uka ai.
S.TRANSL: 但牠不在。
But it’s not there.

S.FORM: ka ungadah tan hai ka uka.
S.TRANSL: 是不是進去了，但不在。
If it went inside of it, but it’s not there.

S.FORM: at aupa.
S.TRANSL: 因為
because

S.FORM: ka ai maupa cia naia tu nii tu inkaduan.
S.TRANSL: 這樣子他們找不到。
This way they won’t find it.

S.FORM: maz adii asu hai.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗
that dog

S.FORM: kaz ai ai at.
S.TRANSL: 就
Then

S.FORM: asu mas uvaaz cia hai ka 嗯 nii ai.
S.TRANSL: 狗和孩子找不到[青蛙]。
The dog and the child can’t [find the frog].

S.FORM: tankakutun tankakutun in tu tu.
S.TRANSL: 已經到了第二天的凌晨。
It was already the morning of the next day.

S.FORM: um’um in.
S.TRANSL: 已經早上了。
It became already morning

S.FORM: tu ai maz a minkailas in hai.
S.TRANSL: 他已經睡醒了。
He woke up.

S.FORM: aupa ai.
S.TRANSL: 因為….呃
Because…uhm

S.FORM: ai makas’aang asu tu ka ingadah ang cia maz a.
S.TRANSL: 狗以為它可能還在裡面。
The dog believed whether it was still inside.

S.FORM: ka malala’la tu sisiuh sisiuh.
S.TRANSL: 一直叫：“青蛙，青蛙！ XXX
kept calling: “Frog Frog

S.FORM: lala’laun hai.
S.TRANSL: 一直叫它。
Shouting for it.

S.FORM: ka asu hai mais isia siul ai ai ka muhalhal.
S.TRANSL: 狗就從窗戶掉下來了。
Then the dog went down from the window.

S.FORM: mais sia siul muhalhal hai.
S.TRANSL: 從窗戶掉下來了。
Then it went down from the window.

S.FORM: ka pan pulaz adii pan a hai.
S.TRANSL: 瓶子就摔破了。
Then the bottle broke.

S.FORM: ahhh ng ai duan kudii uvaz a ka.
S.TRANSL: 我們看到孩子過去。
We can see the child goes there.

S.FORM: makuang is’aang tu.
S.TRANSL: 心裡很難過。
He was really sad.

S.FORM: macinsu saia kunastu hai ka.
S.TRANSL: 他馬上下去。
He immediately went down.

S.FORM: at aupa ai ng alibaun asu at kunata amin naia.
S.TRANSL: 他們抱著狗去外面。
And they went outside holding the dog.

S.FORM: malala’la at maldauk tu kikilim.
S.TRANSL: 一直叫，一直找。
And kept calling and kept on searching.

S.FORM: hai inata naia malala’la hai mikui.
S.TRANSL: 他在外面一直叫，可是
He kept calling outside, but

S.FORM: ung hai maz adii buhusaz a mais ta’aza mas itu bunun tu.
S.TRANSL: 如果那些虎頭蜂聽到人的聲音，
Those hornets, if they hear human sounds,

S.FORM: mais patahusngi as itu bunun tu halinga hai.
S.TRANSL: 如果人的語言吵到它們的話，
If the voices of humans disturb them,

S.FORM: pahasia malala’la naia mas ai.
S.TRANSL: 所以他們一直叫，往誰。
So they kept calling to the, uhm.

S.FORM: asu mas uvaz cia malala’la mas sisiuh cia hai.
S.TRANSL: 狗和孩子往青蛙一直叫。
The dog and the child kept calling out to the frog.

S.FORM: maz adii maz adii bubububuhusaz hai inisian dau lumah hai ka.
S.TRANSL: 虎頭蜂在家，然後
The hornets were at home and then

S.FORM: masan mun ‘apav ai masan mun masan kusbai masa mun’apav in tu.
S.TRANSL: 他們全部都飛出來。
They all flew out.

S.FORM: ai isa bi s sing’ava dau imalala’la dau.
S.TRANSL: 哪裡的聲音一直在叫。
to where the voices were calling out.

S.FORM: aupa aupa maz a maz a uvaz a mas asu hai ka ai na na dadu naia nii tu haiap tu.
S.TRANSL: 因為小孩和狗以為，不知道...
Because the child and the dog thought that, didn’t know that…

S.FORM: maz adii buhusaz mais ta’aza itu bunun tu sing’av hai.
S.TRANSL: 虎頭蜂聽到人的聲音的話，
If the hornets hear the sounds of people,

S.FORM: ai ai hai ka masan mun’apav hai.
S.TRANSL: 他們全部就出來。
then they all come out.

S.FORM: kaz ai.
S.TRANSL: 就，嗯
then uhm

S.FORM: ai.
S.TRANSL: 嗯
Uhm

S.FORM: pahasia saduan ta diian maldauk a hai maz a mas ai sadu mas lak hai ka la’laun amin.
S.TRANSL: 因此我們看得到洞，就叫喊。
So we can see this hole, then call out.

S.FORM: at maz adii asu hai sadu mas itu buhusaz tu lumah hai.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗就看到虎頭蜂的窩。
Then that dog sees the hive of the hornets.

S.FORM: ka lulunglung ka malala’la tu.
S.TRANSL: 就吠起來，就叫喊。
And then it is barking and calling out loud.

S.FORM: ’uang’uang 'uang'uang 'uang ’uang.
S.TRANSL: 汪汪，汪汪，汪，汪
woofwoof woofwoof woof woof

S.FORM: ’uang.
S.TRANSL: 汪
woof

S.FORM: ai at maz a uvaz hai malala’la s lak tu.
S.TRANSL: 然後小朋友一直往洞叫：
Then that child kept calling at the hole:

S.FORM: ingadah cia maz a sisiuh.
S.TRANSL: “你在裡面嗎，青蛙？”
“Are you in there, frog?”

S.FORM: hai malala’la hai.
S.TRANSL: 一直叫。
He kept on shouting

S.FORM: cinhuza maz adii ai.
S.TRANSL: 他嚇了一跳。
He startled.

S.FORM: ai uvaz a ka.
S.TRANSL: 孩子就—
The child then-

S.FORM: ai.
S.TRANSL: 嗯
Uhm

S.FORM: (ma)via tu.
S.TRANSL: 為何
why

S.FORM: ai.
S.TRANSL: 嗯
Uhm

S.FORM: aiza maz a sunsun an maisingadah sia lak tan.
S.TRANSL: 這隻錢鼠是從這個洞出來的嗎？
Did this mouse come from this hole?

S.FORM: ai ai ai inmantukun ta sadu hai.
S.TRANSL: 如果我們仔細地看，
If we look in a more detailed manner,

S.FORM: maz adii sunsun an hai mungaab maszang aluaz cia haitu ka.
S.TRANSL: 那隻錢鼠，幾乎像田鼠。
that mouse, it almost looks like a field mouse.

S.FORM: ai maz adii sunsun hai siamas.
S.TRANSL: 那隻簽署就是。
That mouse looks exactly like it.

S.FORM: kaumas ikit kauman.
S.TRANSL: 小小的。
Very small.

S.FORM: maz adii adadaza sia lukis a hai.
S.TRANSL: 他在樹上。
He is on the tree.

S.FORM: adadaza sia lukis a hai.
S.TRANSL: 在樹上。
on the tree.

S.FORM: hai aiza ai siamas tupaun tu ai o.
S.TRANSL: 喔
Oh

S.FORM: buhusaz hai.
S.TRANSL: 有，就是叫做，虎頭蜂。
There is a, it looks like it’s called, the hornets.

S.FORM: maldauk a asu dii lalunglung.
S.TRANSL: 狗仍然往虎頭蜂吠叫。
The dog keeps barking at them.

S.FORM: lalunglung tu L2’uang’uang L2’uang’uang.
S.TRANSL: 狗吠，汪汪，汪汪。
He barks “woof woof woof woof”.

S.FORM: maupa cia dau.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣。
It was like that.

S.FORM: at.
S.TRANSL: 就
Then

S.FORM: at.
S.TRANSL: 就
Then

S.FORM: ai maupa ciadii asu a ai.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗就這樣嗎？
Was that dog like that?

S.FORM: isia lukis a saia ai.
S.TRANSL: 牠在樹上。
It was in the tree.

S.FORM: si si ai ai taldikus mas lukis cia malala’la mas.
S.TRANSL: 牠抓著樹，一直叫出。
It is holding the tree, and keeps on barking.

S.FORM: ai nii lalunglung mas adii tu buhusaz cia.
S.TRANSL: 不！他吠虎頭蜂。
No! He is barking at the hornets.

S.FORM: ka.
S.TRANSL: 就
then

S.FORM: ai ka nii tu haiap tu ka muhalhal adii maz a ai buhu ai bu husaz a nastu a.
S.TRANSL: 接著他不知道虎頭蜂會掉在地上。
He doesn’t know, the hornet’s nest will falls down the ground.

S.FORM: at aupa ai ai maz adii uvaz a hai sadu mas lukis tu.
S.TRANSL: 就因為那個小朋友看到樹上，
Then, because the child sees that tree， that

S.FORM: aiza maz a lak.
S.TRANSL: 有那個洞。
There is that hole.

S.FORM: hai udadaza cia saia sadu tu.
S.TRANSL: 上面，他看得到。
On it he sees.

S.FORM: maz a sisiuh pahasia ai sadu saia mas ai lukis a aiza maz a lak.
S.TRANSL: 所以青蛙看到樹，有那個洞。
So the frog sees the tree, there is that hole.

S.FORM: maz a uvaz a hai ka macinsuu saia kudadaza sia lukis cia.
S.TRANSL: 小朋友就，馬上爬上樹去。
The child then, he immediately climbs into the tree.

S.FORM: ai ingadah tan a sisiuh idiip an saia malala’la.
S.TRANSL: “青蛙在裡面嗎？”他一直叫問。
“Is the frog inside of it”, he keeps on shouting.

S.FORM: amin asu a hai hai ai hai maldauk malala’la kikilim amin.
S.TRANSL: 還有狗一直叫，找全部。
And the dogkeeps on barking, looking for all of them.

S.FORM: at.
S.TRANSL: 就
Then

S.FORM: aupa.
S.TRANSL: 因為
because

S.FORM: maza uvaaz a hai kudadaza sia lukis tu aupa maza uvaaz a hai sadu mas laak tu ai isia ai ai lukis hai.
S.TRANSL: 然後那個孩子就爬上樹，他看到在樹上的洞。
Then the kid climbs up the tree and sees a hole on the tree.

S.FORM: ung at kudadaza maza uvaaz a ai masi’aupa sia laak cia malala’la hai.
S.TRANSL: 然後孩子爬上去向著樹洞喊叫。
The kid goes up and yells at the hole.

S.FORM: ung at maza dii asu a hai halhalun saicia sangan maza dii ai ai buhusaz.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗把那個虎頭蜂窩弄掉下來。
That dog just made the beehive drop.

S.FORM: sinapun naicia s buhusaz cia pahasia maza dii a asu a hai macisbai hai sisinapu s bahusaz i.
S.TRANSL: 所以那個狗就被虎頭蜂追著逃跑。
So the dog is running away chased by hornets.

S.FORM: maza dii uvaaz a hai cinghuza tu sadu mas ithoo aupa sian maz tu hazam cinghuza hai ka maisisia lukis muhalhal pastak tu nastu.
S.TRANSL: 那個孩子因為看到那個貓頭鷹，嚇一跳從樹上掉到地上
That kid drops down to the ground because seeing the owl.

S.FORM: ungat aupa ai ungat aupa ai ai at ai avandii maza avandii maza batu an hai saduan tu ai aiza dii mazang mas ai mais saduan hai mazang mas lukis haitu mais samantukun ta sadu hai ana mazang mas itu hanvang hanvangngabul tu vaha.
S.TRANSL: 然後那裡有個石頭，有看起來像樹的東西。但是仔細看好像是鹿角。
Then there is a rock as well as something like a tree. However, it seems to be deer’s antlers when being watched carefully.

S.FORM: a ung hai ai aupa kaz itan’iku sia batu cia hai ai adii ai ai uvaaz a hai nii ai nii saia haiaphaiap tu maza sian lukis a sian maz dau hai.
S.TRANSL: 在那個石頭的後面，那個孩子不知道那是不是樹。
Behind the rock, the kid does not know whether it is not a tree.

S.FORM: maza dii asu hai kaz tunghabin ii aupa sininap mas sinapu s buhusaz cia saia hai inastu sia batu cia tunghabin.
S.TRANSL: 那個狗就躲起來，因為被虎頭蜂追了，他就躲到石頭下。
That dog hides. Because being chased by the hornets, it hides under the rock.

S.FORM: at aupa ungat ais at aupa maza dii uvaaz a hai idadaza aupa saia sia batu cia ai taldi taldi taldidikus mas mazang is vaha cia.
S.TRANSL: 那個孩子在那個石頭上，握著像角的東西。
That kid is on the rock, holding the horn-like things.

S.FORM: hai kaz ciudu maza dii ai nadadu dii saia sidi nadadu sain ngabul hai kaz mindangkaz dii ngabul hai.
S.TRANSL: 那個可能是羊還是鹿的剛好就站起來。
The goat or deer stands up meantime.

S.FORM: at aupa maza dii sidi a hai kaz na lahaib siza hai nadadu amin sidi hai ka cinhuza amin saia hai kaz ka macisbai amin saia cisdadaan hai.
S.TRANSL: 也許對那個羊來說，牠也是被嚇跑了。
maybe for that goat, it is also shocked and runs away.

S.FORM: kaz ai ai kaz ai na nadadu sidi a hai ka nii tu haiap tu maza ai na ciadadaanan saicia hai siamas mangdavan hai.
S.TRANSL: 也許山羊不知道他跑的地方是懸崖。
Maybe the goat does not know where it is running is a cliff.

S.FORM: pan’utung saia hai ka maza dii uvaaz mas asu hai ka ai maisidadaza sia itu ngabul cia tu bungu cia muhalhal lananastu sia ai kaz pananastu sia mazang mas ai ai nadadu sian hai danum.
S.TRANSL: 他停下來，那個孩子和狗就從鹿角掉落到地上－－也許這個好像是水。
It stops, and the kind and dog drops from the antler down to the ground-- it seems to be water.

S.FORM: unghai aupa ai ai maz sian maz sian hai sahalan tu kaz danum sian.
S.TRANSL: 因為這個看得出來是水。
because it can be understood as water.

S.FORM: at maza uvaaz a hai kaz maisidadaza naia sia itu ai ngabul cia tu bungu cia tu vaha cia tasku s asu cia tandusa muhalhal lanangadah sia danum.
S.TRANSL: 然後那個孩子和狗，他們就從上面掉到水裡。
Then they, the kid and dog, drops down to the water.

S.FORM: ai ung hai mais saduan hai halkai tu pannangadah sia danum hai.
S.TRANSL: 雖然看起來是掉到水裡。
It looks like they dropped into the water though.

S.FORM: ung hai tu ai mahtu ta haiapun tu cisi mais ai mais maupa cia tu pannangadah danum hai mahtu kata miliskin tu via tu ai via tu.
S.TRANSL: 我們其實可以去想想為什麼他們掉到水裡。
We can think about why they dropped into the water actually.

S.FORM: mahtu tupaun tu mas ai mahtu tupaun tu masial ai.
S.TRANSL: 我們可以說很好。
We can tell that is good.

S.FORM: pahasia na saduan ta sangan in tu via tu ai mais pannangadha danum hai maszang mas masial.
S.TRANSL: 所以我們待會要來看看為什麼說掉到水裡好像很好。
So we are going to see why we say it is good to drop into the water.

S.FORM: saia lanangadah sia danum hai macinsuu saia mal’anuhu mindangkaz at amaun saicia asu a.
S.TRANSL: 他掉到水裡坐著。他馬上站起來，把狗背著。
He drops into the water and sits there. He stands up right away and carries the dog on his back.

S.FORM: na asa saia naasa saia kusisila.
S.TRANSL: 他想要去河邊。
He wants to go to the riverside.

S.FORM: ai ai masa kusisila cia hai aiza maza isisila cia ai madaing tu lukis ai mahaliv in tu lukis.
S.TRANSL: 當他去到河邊時，有一個乾枯的樹。
When he goes to the riverside, there is a dead tree.

S.FORM: ung ung at aupa saia hai ai naia hai talidikus naia lukis cia aupa.
S.TRANSL: 他們扶著樹。
They hold the tree.

S.FORM: ai kudadaza naia sia lukis cia ai kusia sisila.
S.TRANSL: 他們走到了那個枯樹的邊上。
The go onto the side of the dead tree.

S.FORM: at aupa ai ung at aupa maza dii lukis a hai mazang mas laak aupa hai.
S.TRANSL: 那個樹好像個洞。
The tree seems to be a hole.

S.FORM: ung hai ai mapising in adii uvaaz a tu na kaz mazang sangan tu malala’la sia laak hai pacinghuzau s hazam pahasia tupaun saicia adii asu a tu manungsiva.
S.TRANSL: 那個孩子擔心大喊會像剛才大喊嚇到鳥的事發生，所以告訴狗說安靜。
The kid worries things like that they have yelled out loud and scared the bird might happen again, so he tells the dog to be quiet.

S.FORM: ai kaa in as lunglung.
S.TRANSL: 你不可以叫！
you cannot bark!

S.FORM: aupa daungkav naia lukis cia ai ai ai tasban mudaan.
S.TRANSL: 他們翻過那個枯樹走了。
They turn across the dead tree and went away.

S.FORM: ung at aupa ai daungkav naia hai ai sadu naia tu ai at kaz cinhuza naia tu ai via tu aiza.
S.TRANSL: 他們跨過去一看，嚇到。
They cross and see, and they are shocked.

S.FORM: mais saduan hai tasa dusa tau paat ima nuum pitu vau siva mas’an uh ka mas’an in at mas’an in at sisiuh minsuma hai maza dii uvaaz a hai.
S.TRANSL: 看起來，（一數到十），哦！有十個青蛙孩子來了。
It looks like — counting from one to ten— ten frog kids come.

S.FORM: nadadu saia hai ai saia hai masial saia tu at kaz ai amuhangsia dii ai amuhangsia maza sisiuh a hai kaz nii tu kaz nii tu munpungav.
S.TRANSL: 他覺得太好了，原來青蛙沒弄丟。
He thinks it is good! It turns out that the frog is not lost.

S.FORM: ung at maza nanu tu ai ai sinaipuk saicia tu sisiuh a hai kaz ai sizaun saicia mudaan.
S.TRANSL: 他就把他原來養的青蛙拿走了。
He takes the frog he kept home.

S.FORM: at ai kaz ai at maza ai duma maza sisiuh a hai tasa dusa tau paat ima nuum pitu vau siva kaz in siva ii aupa nanu hai mas’an aupa hai.
S.TRANSL: 剩下的其他的青蛙就是九隻了。本來是十隻。
Nine frogs remain now. There used to be ten.

S.FORM: ung hai ai sizau s uvaaz cia tasa na mudaan aupa na kulumah pahasia.
S.TRANSL: 孩子要拿一隻回家。
The kid takes one home.

S.FORM: amuhangsia maza sisiuh an hai aupa mazima sisiuh a talinangadah sia danum ung at.
S.TRANSL: 原來青蛙喜歡在水裡。
It turns out that frogs like being in water.

S.FORM: ung at aupa ai kaz maza ai ung at maza sia dii danum tu sisila hai ai aiza maza lukis a hai maz ung at hai maz amin sisiuh a hai mazima amin sisiuh an takidadaza sia sisila s danum tu lukis.
S.TRANSL: 水邊有樹，青蛙也喜歡住在水邊的枯樹。
There are dead trees near the riverside. Frogs also like to live at the dead trees at the riverside.

S.FORM: pahasia naia hai mahtu tupaun halkai tu pannangadah danum hai kaz kaz manaskal naia ii aupa saigu hai inkadua s adii tu sisiuh tan at kaupa cia.
S.TRANSL: 所以說他們雖然掉到水裡，但是他們很開心因為他們最後找到青蛙了。結束。
Although they have dropped into the water, they are happy because the finally find the frog. The end.
